infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SoulSync uses your camera to capture photos and videos for your shared memory vault.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SoulSync needs access to your photos to add them to your shared vault.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SoulSync uses your microphone to record voice notes for your partner.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Share your live location with your partner.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Send safe-arrival pings and ETA in the background.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Unlock your private vault with Face ID.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SoulSync to access your photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SoulSync to record voice notes.
